title: Lesson title no longer reflects actual lesson name from database
body: The fix makes the displayed title (e.g., 'Lesson 4') derived from index, not from lesson.title. This means the actual lesson name/title stored in the database is not shown on the card. If lessons have meaningful titles beyond just 'Lesson N', this could be a regression.
rationale: The original behavior used lesson.title which could be stale/incorrect after lesson reordering. The fix ensures consistency between badge and title at the cost of hiding the database title.
